name: feature.campaign-channels.nodes
description: Campaign Studio channel-generation node pack (ADR 0157 / ADR 0014). One parameterized `generate` node turns a brief's messaging kernel into a channel deliverable (landing page / ad variants / email sequence / creative briefs / social posts) — grounded in the KB (kb.rag citations) + brand voice (ctx.features.brand) via the run-scoped provider — plus a `content.quality.check` node. Drives the five channel child workflows the orchestration (ADR 0158) fans out.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Channel: Generate
nodes.description: Generates a channel deliverable from a brief's kernel + KB grounding + brand voice. Inputs: { briefId, channel, provider?, model? }. Output: { draft }. channel ∈ {landing_page, ad_variants, email_sequence, creative_briefs, social_posts}.

nodes.label: Channel: Content Quality Check
nodes.description: Scores a generated channel draft (0-100) on citation presence, length vs the channel cap, and kernel echo. Non-blocking — the report flows to the approval gate. Inputs: { draft, channel, maxLength? }. Output: { report }.

nodes.label: Channel: Publish Landing Page
nodes.description: Publishes a landing_page draft as a real DRAFT CMS page (ADR 0162) via ctx.features.cms.createDraftPage — first section → hero, rest → richText/cta. Never auto-publishes; idempotent on a deterministic pageId. Inputs: { draft, briefId? | orgId? }. Output: { page }.

nodes.label: Channel: Publish Email Sequence
nodes.description: Publishes an email_sequence draft as real DRAFT email entities (ADR 0162) via ctx.features.email.createDraftCampaign — one draft template + one draft campaign per email step. Never sends; idempotent on deterministic ids. Inputs: { draft, briefId? | orgId?, stage? }. Output: { campaign }.

nodes.label: Channel: Publish Ad Copy
nodes.description: Publishes an ad_variants draft as a DRAFT 'campaign-ad-copy' document (ADR 0166) via ctx.features.documents.createDraftDocument — Markdown, one section per platform with a variant table. A handoff packet (no live ad dispatch — that's RFC-gated). Idempotent. Inputs: { draft, briefId? | orgId? }. Output: { document }.

nodes.label: Channel: Publish Creative Briefs
nodes.description: Publishes a creative_briefs draft as a DRAFT 'campaign-creative-briefs' document (ADR 0166) via ctx.features.documents.createDraftDocument — Markdown, one section per brief (scene/composition/messaging). Idempotent. Inputs: { draft, briefId? | orgId? }. Output: { document }.

nodes.label: Channel: Publish Social Calendar
nodes.description: Publishes a social_posts draft as a DRAFT 'campaign-social-calendar' document (ADR 0166) via ctx.features.documents.createDraftDocument — Markdown, posts grouped by platform with hashtags. A handoff packet (no live social dispatch — RFC-gated). Idempotent. Inputs: { draft, briefId? | orgId? }. Output: { document }.
